name: FAMILIAL IDIOPATHIC ACROOSTEOLYSIS
definition: HAJDU-CHENEY SYNDROME rare bizarre entity of unknown etiology
discriminating_features: pseudoclubbing of fingers + toes with osteolysis of terminal + more proximal phalanges
hypoplasia of proximal end of radius

general: pseudoclubbing of fingers + toes with osteolysis of terminal + more proximal phalanges
hypoplasia of proximal end of radius
wide sutures, persistent metopic suture, wormian bones, poorly developed sinuses
severe osteoporosis + fractures at multiple sites (esp. of spine)
